attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT
FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH
,WC_TRNX_FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT
,HW_FAMILY
,SUM(ALLOCATED_COST) AS SSC_TOTAL_COST
FROM
(SELECT
(SELECT FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT FROM $$STGDB.WI_TSS_COST_CNTRL_MONTH_ID) AS FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH,
MTY.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT AS WC_TRNX_FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT,
SSSCC.ALLOCATED_COST_USD_AMT AS ALLOCATED_COST,
SSSCC.SRC_RPTD_HW_PRDT_FAMILY_NAME AS HW_FAMILY
FROM $$FINLGLVWDB.N_SR_SERVICE_SUPPORT_CENTER_COST SSSCC
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.R_FISCAL_MONTH_TO_YEAR MTY 
ON (SSSCC.BK_SR_SSC_COST_FSCL_YR_NUM_INT = MTY.FISCAL_YEAR_NUMBER_INT AND SSSCC.BK_SR_SSC_COST_FSCL_MTH_NUM_INT = MTY.FISCAL_MONTH_NUMBER_INT)
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.R_FISCAL_MONTH_TO_YEAR SHIP_MTY 
ON (SSSCC.BK_SHIPPED_FISCAL_YEAR_NUM_INT = SHIP_MTY.FISCAL_YEAR_NUMBER_INT AND SSSCC.BK_SHIPPED_FISCAL_MTH_NUM_INT = SHIP_MTY.FISCAL_MONTH_NUMBER_INT)
) PV_SR_SERVICE_SUPPORT_CENTER_COST
WHERE WC_TRNX_FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT  IN 
(SELECT DISTINCT FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT FROM $$STGDB.WI_TSS_COST_CNTRL_MONTH_ID_WC)
GROUP BY
1,2,3

SELECT 
FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH
,WC_TRNX_FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT
,HW_FAMILY
,SUM((NVL(WARRANTY_PARTS_PCT, 0) * ALLOCATED_COST)) AS SSC_WARRANTY_COST
FROM 
(SELECT
(SELECT FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT FROM $$STGDB.WI_TSS_COST_CNTRL_MONTH_ID) AS FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH,
SSSCC.ALLOCATED_COST_USD_AMT AS ALLOCATED_COST,
MTY.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT AS WC_TRNX_FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT,
SSSCC.SRC_RPTD_HW_PRDT_FAMILY_NAME AS HW_FAMILY,
SSSCC.WARRANTY_PARTS_PCT AS WARRANTY_PARTS_PCT,
SSSCC.FAILURE_CD AS FAILURE_CODE
FROM $$FINLGLVWDB.N_SR_SERVICE_SUPPORT_CENTER_COST SSSCC
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.R_FISCAL_MONTH_TO_YEAR MTY 
ON (SSSCC.BK_SR_SSC_COST_FSCL_YR_NUM_INT = MTY.FISCAL_YEAR_NUMBER_INT AND SSSCC.BK_SR_SSC_COST_FSCL_MTH_NUM_INT = MTY.FISCAL_MONTH_NUMBER_INT)
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.R_FISCAL_MONTH_TO_YEAR SHIP_MTY 
ON (SSSCC.BK_SHIPPED_FISCAL_YEAR_NUM_INT = SHIP_MTY.FISCAL_YEAR_NUMBER_INT AND SSSCC.BK_SHIPPED_FISCAL_MTH_NUM_INT = SHIP_MTY.FISCAL_MONTH_NUMBER_INT)
) PV_SR_SERVICE_SUPPORT_CENTER_COST
WHERE WC_TRNX_FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT  IN 
(SELECT DISTINCT FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT FROM $$STGDB.WI_TSS_COST_CNTRL_MONTH_ID_WC)
AND FAILURE_CODE NOT IN ('ARFN',   'ARFNU',   'ARCD',   'ARLN',   'ARMPC',   'NONHW',   'MFS',   'SPURIN',   'SPURLB',   'OFDS',   '-888' )
GROUP BY 1,2,3

SELECT
 (SELECT FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT FROM $$STGDB.WI_TSS_COST_CNTRL_MONTH_ID) AS FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH
,SSC_WARR.WC_TRNX_FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT AS WC_TRNX_FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT
,SSC_WARR.HW_FAMILY
,SSC_TOTAL.SSC_TOTAL_COST
,SSC_WARR.SSC_WARRANTY_COST
,SSC_WARR.SSC_WARRANTY_COST / SSC_TOTAL.SSC_TOTAL_COST AS SSC_PCT
FROM $$STGDB.WI_WC_CNTRL_SSC_TOTAL SSC_TOTAL
iNNER JOIN $$STGDB.WI_WC_CNTRL_SSC_WARR SSC_WARR 
ON SSC_WARR.WC_TRNX_FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT = SSC_TOTAL.WC_TRNX_FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT
AND SSC_WARR.HW_FAMILY = SSC_TOTAL.HW_FAMILY
WHERE SSC_TOTAL.WC_TRNX_FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT  IN 
(SELECT DISTINCT FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT FROM $$STGDB.WI_TSS_COST_CNTRL_MONTH_ID_WC)

SELECT 
FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH
,WC_TRNX_FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT
,HYBRID_PRODUCT_FAMILY
,SUM(TAC_BB_COST+TAC_OT_COST) TAC_TOTAL_COST
,SUM(((TAC_BB_COST+TAC_OT_COST)*WARRANTY_PCT)/100) TAC_WARR_DETAIL_COST
FROM 
(
SELECT 
(SELECT FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT FROM $$STGDB.WI_TSS_COST_CNTRL_MONTH_ID) AS FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH,
MTY.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT WC_TRNX_FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT,
STACC.SRC_RPTD_SERVICE_CONTRACT_LINE_NAME HYBRID_PRODUCT_FAMILY,
(DECODE (STACC.DELIVERY_CHANNEL_NAME,'BB', COALESCE (STACC.TAC_OUT_TASKING_COST_AMT, 0), 0))  TAC_BB_COST,
(DECODE (STACC.DELIVERY_CHANNEL_NAME, 'OT', COALESCE (STACC.TAC_OUT_TASKING_COST_AMT, 0), 0))  TAC_OT_COST,
STACC.WARRANTY_PCT WARRANTY_PCT
FROM $$FINLGLVWDB.N_SR_TECHNI_ASSIST_CENTER_COST STACC
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.R_FISCAL_MONTH_TO_YEAR MTY
ON STACC.BK_SR_TAC_COST_FSCL_YR_NUM_INT = MTY.FISCAL_YEAR_NUMBER_INT
AND STACC.BK_SR_TAC_COST_FSCL_MTH_NUM_INT = MTY.FISCAL_MONTH_NUMBER_INT
)PV_SR_TECHNI_ASSIST_CENTER_COST
WHERE WC_TRNX_FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT  IN 
(SELECT DISTINCT FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT FROM $$STGDB.WI_TSS_COST_CNTRL_MONTH_ID_WC)
GROUP BY 1,2,3

SELECT
FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH,
WC_TRNX_FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT,
HYBRID_PRODUCT_FAMILY,
SUM(TAC_BB_COST+TAC_OT_COST) AS TAC_TOTAL_COST
FROM 
(
SELECT 
(SELECT FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT FROM $$STGDB.WI_TSS_COST_CNTRL_MONTH_ID) AS FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH,
MTY.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT WC_TRNX_FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT,
STACC.SRC_RPTD_SERVICE_CONTRACT_LINE_NAME HYBRID_PRODUCT_FAMILY,
(DECODE (STACC.DELIVERY_CHANNEL_NAME,'BB', COALESCE (STACC.TAC_OUT_TASKING_COST_AMT, 0), 0))  TAC_BB_COST,
(DECODE (STACC.DELIVERY_CHANNEL_NAME, 'OT', COALESCE (STACC.TAC_OUT_TASKING_COST_AMT, 0), 0))  TAC_OT_COST
FROM $$FINLGLVWDB.N_SR_TECHNI_ASSIST_CENTER_COST STACC
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.R_FISCAL_MONTH_TO_YEAR MTY
ON STACC.BK_SR_TAC_COST_FSCL_YR_NUM_INT = MTY.FISCAL_YEAR_NUMBER_INT
AND STACC.BK_SR_TAC_COST_FSCL_MTH_NUM_INT = MTY.FISCAL_MONTH_NUMBER_INT
)PV_SR_TECHNI_ASSIST_CENTER_COST
WHERE WC_TRNX_FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT  IN 
(SELECT DISTINCT FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT FROM $$STGDB.WI_TSS_COST_CNTRL_MONTH_ID_WC)
GROUP BY 1,2,3

SELECT
(SELECT FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT FROM $$STGDB.WI_TSS_COST_CNTRL_MONTH_ID) AS FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH
,TAC_BY_PF.WC_TRNX_FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT AS WC_TRNX_FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT
,TAC_BY_PF.HYBRID_PRODUCT_FAMILY
,SSC_WARR_TOTAL_PCT.SSC_PCT
,TAC_BY_PF.TAC_TOTAL_COST
,TAC_WARR_DETAIL.TAC_WARR_DETAIL_COST
,CAST((CASE WHEN (SSC_WARR_TOTAL_PCT.SSC_PCT * TAC_BY_PF.TAC_TOTAL_COST) < TAC_WARR_DETAIL_COST THEN TAC_WARR_DETAIL_COST 
 ELSE (SSC_WARR_TOTAL_PCT.SSC_PCT * TAC_BY_PF.TAC_TOTAL_COST) 
 END) AS DECIMAL(26,12)) AS TAC_WARR_COST
,(CAST((CASE WHEN (SSC_WARR_TOTAL_PCT.SSC_PCT * TAC_BY_PF.TAC_TOTAL_COST) < TAC_WARR_DETAIL_COST THEN TAC_WARR_DETAIL_COST
  ELSE (SSC_WARR_TOTAL_PCT.SSC_PCT * TAC_BY_PF.TAC_TOTAL_COST) 
  END)AS DECIMAL(26,12)) - TAC_WARR_DETAIL_COST) AS TAC_ALLOCATED_COST
FROM $$STGDB.WI_WC_CNTRL_TAC_BY_PF TAC_BY_PF
INNER JOIN $$STGDB.WI_WC_CNTRL_SSC_WARR_TOTAL_PCT SSC_WARR_TOTAL_PCT
ON (TAC_BY_PF.WC_TRNX_FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT = SSC_WARR_TOTAL_PCT.WC_TRNX_FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT
AND TAC_BY_PF.HYBRID_PRODUCT_FAMILY = SSC_WARR_TOTAL_PCT.HW_FAMILY)
INNER JOIN $$STGDB.WI_WC_CNTRL_TAC_WARR_DETAIL TAC_WARR_DETAIL 
ON (TAC_BY_PF.WC_TRNX_FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT = TAC_WARR_DETAIL.WC_TRNX_FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT
AND TAC_BY_PF.HYBRID_PRODUCT_FAMILY = TAC_WARR_DETAIL.HYBRID_PRODUCT_FAMILY)
WHERE SSC_WARR_TOTAL_PCT.SSC_PCT > 0 
AND TAC_BY_PF.WC_TRNX_FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT  IN 
(SELECT DISTINCT FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT FROM $$STGDB.WI_TSS_COST_CNTRL_MONTH_ID_WC)

SELECT
FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH
,WC_TRNX_FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT
,HYBRID_PRODUCT_FAMILY
,CAST(SUM(TAC_ALLOCATED_NEW_COST) OVER (PARTITION BY WC_TRNX_FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT, HYBRID_PRODUCT_FAMILY) AS DECIMAL(30,16))/CAST(SUM(NULLIF(TAC_ALLOCATED_NEW_COST,0)) OVER (PARTITION BY WC_TRNX_FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT) AS DECIMAL(30,16)) AS ALLOC_TAC_PCT
FROM 
(
SELECT
(SELECT FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT FROM $$STGDB.WI_TSS_COST_CNTRL_MONTH_ID) AS FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH
,WC_TRNX_FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT AS WC_TRNX_FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT
,HYBRID_PRODUCT_FAMILY
,SUM(TAC_ALLOCATED_NEW.TAC_WARR_COST) AS TAC_WARR_NEW_COST
,SUM(TAC_ALLOCATED_NEW.TAC_ALLOCATED_COST) AS TAC_ALLOCATED_NEW_COST
FROM $$STGDB.WI_WC_CNTRL_ALLCTD_TAC_PF_MTCH TAC_ALLOCATED_NEW
WHERE WC_TRNX_FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT  IN 
(SELECT DISTINCT FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT FROM $$STGDB.WI_TSS_COST_CNTRL_MONTH_ID_WC)
GROUP BY 1,2,3
)A

SELECT
(SELECT FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT FROM $$STGDB.WI_TSS_COST_CNTRL_MONTH_ID) AS FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH
,TAC_BY_PF.WC_TRNX_FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT AS WC_TRNX_FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT
,TAC_BY_PF.HYBRID_PRODUCT_FAMILY
,SUM((CAST((A.CENTRALIZED_COST_USD_AMT * B.SSC_PCT * CAST(C.ALLOC_TAC_PCT AS DECIMAL(26,6))) AS DECIMAL(30,0)))) AS TS_CNTRL_PLATFORMS_WC_COST
FROM $$STGDB.WI_WC_CNTRL_TAC_BY_PF TAC_BY_PF
/*INNER JOIN FINLGLVWDB.MT_CX_CENTRALIZED_COGS A*/ 
INNER JOIN  $$STGDB.MT_CX_CENTRALIZED_COGS_CXBAT   A 
ON (A.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT = TAC_BY_PF.WC_TRNX_FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT
AND A.DV_CX_LINE_OF_BIZ_CODE = 'TSS'
AND A.DV_COST_TYPE = 'Platforms' )
INNER JOIN $$STGDB.WI_WC_CNTRL_SSC_WARR_TOTAL_PCT B 
ON (A.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT = B.WC_TRNX_FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT
AND B.HW_FAMILY=TAC_BY_PF.HYBRID_PRODUCT_FAMILY)
INNER JOIN $$STGDB.WI_WC_CNTRL_ALLCTD_TAC_PCT C  
ON (C.WC_TRNX_FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT = A.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT
AND C.HYBRID_PRODUCT_FAMILY = TAC_BY_PF.HYBRID_PRODUCT_FAMILY)
WHERE A.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT IN
(SELECT DISTINCT FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT FROM $$STGDB.WI_TSS_COST_CNTRL_MONTH_ID_WC)
GROUP BY 1,2,3
